title: heliopsis helianthoides var. scabra
intro: Heliopsis helianthoides var. scabra, also known as rough oxeye or rough false sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Heliopsis helianthoides var. scabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to calm the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
